title: Mattel might have ‘Barbie,' but archrival Hasbro still has plenty in the tank for next year, analyst says, as shares rally
text: Hasbro Inc. this month forecast falling sales for this year, as the strike in Hollywood weighs on its entertainment segment. But BofA analysts on Tuesday said the toy and game maker should get a jolt in profit next year on the popularity of games like Monopoly Go and Baldur's Gate 3.

title: Here are the 18 stocks Jim Cramer is watching, including a big Goldman call on AI names
text: Here are some of the tickers on my radar for Tuesday, Aug. 22 taken directly from my reporter's notebook.

title: Hasbro Announces Women Innovators of Play Event
text: PAWTUCKET, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hasbro, Inc. (NASDAQ: HAS), a leading toy and game company, today announced the Hasbro Women Innovators of Play event, held virtually on September 12 between 10 am – 12:30 pm ET. A special key announcement will also be shared during the day's program. The event will be centered on women's leadership, innovation, and women-led creativity. Participants will learn about the process of pitching a new toy or game and the journey through the Hasbro pipeline from conc.

title: Hasbro to Participate in the Goldman Sachs Communacopia and Technology Conference
text: PAWTUCKET, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $HAS--Hasbro to Participate in the Goldman Sachs Communacopia and Technology Conference.

title: Hasbro's Position As A Toymaking Leader Will Be Reinforced By Streamlining Efforts
text: Hasbro has achieved a 10% YoY decline in net revenues and a net loss of -$235mn in the past quarter. The company's long-run growth strategy focuses on executing its margin-focused 'Blueprint 2.0' and investing in ROE-rich growth drivers. Hasbro is undervalued by approximately 10% according to discounted cash flow valuation, with a fair value of $79.23.

title: Hasbro Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend on Common Shares
text: PAWTUCKET, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $HAS--Hasbro Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend on Common Shares.

title: Hasbro sells off costly production studio, taking a page from Mattel's playbook
text: Utilizing third-party studios and distributors to create TV and film content minimizes financial risk for Hasbro, as it did Mattel.

title: Hasbro (HAS) Q2 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Surpass
text: Hasbro's (HAS) second-quarter fiscal 2023 top line reflects dismal performances of Franchise Brands, Partner Brands and Portfolio Brands.

title: Hasbro to sell film, TV assets as it warns of hit to revenue from Hollywood strike
text: Hasbro said it would sell its eOne film and TV studio to Lionsgate Entertainment by year-end for about $500 million

title: Hasbro, Inc. (HAS) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Hasbro, Inc. (NASDAQ:HAS ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call August 3, 2023 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Chris Cocks - Chief Executive Officer Gina Goetter - Chief Financial Officer Kristen Levy - Senior Manager, Investor Relations Conference Call Participants Andrew Uerkwitz - Jeffries Arpiné Kocharyan - UBS Jaime Katz - Morningstar Eric Handler - ROTH MKM Fred Whiteman - Wolf Research Jason Haas - Bank of America Stephen Laszczyk - Goldman Sachs Operator Good morning and welcome to Hasbro's Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call. At this time all parties will be in listen-only mode.

title: Here's What Key Metrics Tell Us About Hasbro (HAS) Q2 Earnings
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Hasbro (HAS) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Hasbro Pivoting To “Asset-Lite” Entertainment Model Following eOne Sale
text: Hasbro will move to an “asset lite model for future live action entertainment” following the $500M eOne sale, according to CEO Chris Cocks. Speaking as the toy giant unveiled the eOne deal plus Q2 earnings, Cocks said that, going forwards, Hasbro will rely on licensing and partnerships with select co-production partners.

title: Hasbro stock boosted by ‘better-than-fear' quarterly results
text: Hasbro (NASDAQ:HAS) stock traded in positive territory after reporting a better-than-feared revenue decline in its second quarter, helped by new products for the Furby and magic: the gathering IP. Second quarter revenue was down 10% at US$1.21 billion, bringing the first half revenue total to US$2.211 billion.

title: Hasbro (HAS) Q2 Earnings Lag Estimates
text: Hasbro (HAS) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.49 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.58 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.15 per share a year ago.

title: Hasbro adj. Q2 profit misses analyst estimate but revenue beats the mark
text: Hasbro Inc. HAS, -0.28% stock was up 2.5% in premarket trades after it beat its revenue target but missed on adjusted earnings. The toy maker reported a second-quarter loss of $235 million, or $1.69 a share, after reporting year-ago profit of $1.42 million, or $1.02 a share.

title: Hasbro adj. Q2 profit misses analyst estimate but revenue beats the mark
text: Hasbro Inc. HAS, -0.28% stock was up 2.5% in premarket trades after it beat its revenue target but missed on adjusted earnings. The toy maker reported a second-quarter loss of $235 million, or $1.69 a share, after reporting year-ago profit of $1.42 million, or $1.02 a share.

title: Hasbro to sell eOne film and TV business to Lionsgate for$500 million and retire $400 million of floating-rate debt
text: Hasbro Inc. HAS, -0.28% said Thursday it has agreed to sell its eOne film and TV business to Lionsgate for about $500 million, split between $375 million in cash and the assumption of production financing loans. The toy maker said it will use the proceeds to retire at least $400 million of floating-rate debt by year-end.

title: Hasbro adjusted. Q2 profit misses analyst estimate but revenue beats the mark
text: Hasbro Inc. stock HAS, -0.28% was up 2.5% in premarket trades after it beat its revenue target for its latest quarter but missed on adjusted earnings. The toy maker reported a second-quarter loss of $235 million, or $1.69 a share, after reporting year-ago profit of $1.42 million, or $1.02 a share.

title: Hasbro adjusted Q2 profit misses analyst estimate but revenue beats the mark
text: Hasbro Inc. HAS, -0.28% stock was up 2.5% in premarket trades after the toymaker beat its revenue target but missed on adjusted earnings.

text: PAWTUCKET, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $HAS--Hasbro to Sell eOne Film & TV Business to Lionsgate.

title: This High-Yielding Dividend Stock Is Hiding in Plain Sight
text: Hasbro's sales soared prior to this inflationary period, and it has strong brand assets. It's diversifying beyond toys to media and gaming -- a strategy that is bearing fruit.

title: Lionsgate Closing In On eOne Acquisition As Hasbro Q2 Earnings Call Nears
text: Speculation is intensifying that Lionsgate is getting closer to a deal to acquire the Hasbro-owned Entertainment One. The timing is not coincidental. Hasbro is set to report second quarter 2023 earnings Thursday morning.
